atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports three-month history of intermittent chest pain and difficulty swallowing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing intermittent chest pain approximately three months ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the chest pain was described as sharp and felt like a heart attack.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing occasional heartburn or indigestion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is unsure if she has ever had heartburn.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes the chest pain and swallowing issues to a stressful job transition.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports trying to lose weight.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals mild tenderness to light palpation in the upper abdominal quadrants.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's vital signs are within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination does not reveal any abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chest pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty swallowing

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician suspects esophageal issues

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician suspects gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD)

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician suspects musculoskeletal etiologies

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician suspects anxiety

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician plans an upper endoscopy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician plans to monitor for additional symptoms

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician orders follow-up in four weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician instructs the patient to call the office if she experiences pain or difficulty swallowing
